title: Dependency Log Entry
description: A single entry in the dependency log, tracking cross-team, external, or infrastructure dependencies that affect delivery.

description.description: Clear description of the dependency and what it blocks or enables

owner.description: Person or team responsible for delivering or resolving this dependency

dependent_team.description: Team or workstream that depends on this item being resolved

phase.description: Lifecycle phase in which this dependency is needed

due_date.description: Date by which this dependency must be resolved (ISO 8601)

type.description: Type of dependency for classification and escalation routing

risk_level.description: Risk level if this dependency is not resolved by due date

escalation_path.description: Escalation chain if the dependency cannot be resolved by the owner

updated.description: Date the entry was last updated (ISO 8601)

resolution_notes.description: How the dependency was resolved or why it was closed
